description: Comprehensive transition map covering universal topic transitions, cross-language transfers, synergies, and mastery gates

config.description: Global configuration for knowledge retention and review mechanics

universal_transitions.rationale: Understanding program execution flow naturally leads to learning precise syntax rules and conventions.
High transferability as understanding syntax precision is the prerequisite for declaring and using variables across all languages.
Conditionals rely heavily on mastery of boolean types and comparison operators learned in the Variables phase.
Loops are essentially repetitive conditionals; mastering 'if' logic directly translates to 'while' and 'for' termination conditions.
Logic encapsulation in functions often involves iterative processing, though the concept of scope adds new complexity.
Passing collections to functions and returning them is a core pattern. Mastery of function signatures eases the use of collection methods.
Objects/Classes are often conceptualized as complex data structures. Understanding how to manage data in lists/maps assists in managing state in objects.

intra_language_synergy.description: Practicing loops reinforces conditional logic understanding
Function parameters and scope deepen variable comprehension
Working with collections heavily reinforces iteration patterns
Object-oriented programming reinforces data structure management
Methods in OOP deepen understanding of function concepts

cross_language_transfer.note: Similar high-level abstractions; main friction is braces vs indentation and type coercion
Conceptual transfer is high; syntax friction from dynamic to static typing and OOP strictness
Significant friction from memory management, pointers, and compilation complexity
Go's simplicity helps, but static typing and explicit error handling add friction
Very smooth transition; Python's clean syntax feels like an acceleration
Static typing and strict OOP are major friction points from JS's flexibility
Memory management and low-level control create significant challenges
Goroutines and channels are new concepts, but overall transition is smooth
Python feels liberating after Java's verbosity; acceleration from reduced boilerplate
OOP foundation helps, but prototype-based inheritance and weak typing need adjustment
Strong OOP and static typing transfer well; manual memory management is the major friction
Static typing helps, but composition over inheritance requires mindset shift
Massive acceleration from automatic memory management and simpler syntax
High-level abstractions feel easy after C++; weak typing is unusual but liberating
C++ mastery makes Java syntax feel like a simplified, safer subset
Go's simplicity and garbage collection feel like an acceleration after C++
Python's dynamic nature and extensive stdlib feel powerful after Go's minimalism
Function-first approach transfers well; async patterns differ but concepts align
Static typing helps, but Java's OOP strictness and verbosity create friction
Pointer concepts transfer, but manual memory management and complexity are challenging

mapping_specific_cross_language_transfer.note: Compilation and main method concepts transfer nearly perfectly
C++ syntax mastery makes Java syntax feel like a simplified subset
Lower acceleration due to transition from dynamic typing to Go's strict static typing and pointer basics
Static typing transfers well; pointers add complexity
Conditional logic patterns are nearly identical
Iteration patterns (foreach/for-in) are highly similar conceptually
Python's for-in directly maps to JS for-of
First-class functions and closures transfer well
Function patterns and closures are similar
Collection frameworks map to STL, but memory management differs
Strong OOP foundation transfers exceptionally well
C++ OOP mastery makes Java OOP trivial
OOP concepts transfer but strict typing and interfaces add complexity

soft_gates.description: OOP is a critical milestone requiring strong foundations in variables, functions, and collections
Functions require solid understanding of variables, control flow, and iteration
Collections require strong grasp of types and iteration patterns

language_specific_modifiers.reason: Pointers and manual memory concepts significantly increase complexity
Multiple inheritance, virtual functions, and destructors add complexity
Strict OOP with interfaces and abstract classes increases learning curve
Indentation-based syntax is more intuitive for beginners
Closures, hoisting, and callback patterns add complexity
Composition-based approach is simpler than classical inheritance

adaptive_difficulty_curves.description: Dynamic difficulty adjustment based on recent learner performance

performance_windows.description: Number of recent questions to evaluate performance

adjustment_rules.description: High accuracy - challenge the learner more
Very low accuracy - significant difficulty reduction and review prerequisites

spaced_repetition_intervals.description: Optimal review intervals based on current mastery level following spaced repetition principles

intervals.description: Below maintenance threshold - frequent review needed

common_patterns.common_message: Missing semicolon at end of statement
Cannot assign value of one type to variable of another type
Variable used before declaration or initialization
Using = instead of == or === for comparison
Loop iterates one time too many or too few
Function expected to return value but doesn't
Wrong number or type of arguments passed to function
Attempting to access array/list element beyond its size
Incorrect use of inheritance or super/parent calls
Accessing private members from outside the class

prerequisite_strength_weights.description: OOP requires strong understanding of variables, functions, and collections
Functions build on variables, conditionals, and loops
Collections require solid grasp of types, iteration, and function usage
Loops heavily depend on conditional logic understanding
Conditionals require understanding of variables and boolean types

requires_understanding_of.description: Must understand conditionals for loop termination
Must understand variables for parameters and returns

reinforces.description: Iterating collections heavily reinforces loop concepts

requires_understanding_of.description: Must understand types for collection usage
Must understand loops to iterate collections

reinforces.description: Object state management reinforces collection usage

requires_understanding_of.description: Must understand variables for instance state
